en.welcome:
👋 Welcome to NIFTI!

Your smart business card awaits.
Create your free card now (TON wallet required).
en.card_name: 📝 What name should appear on your card?
en.card_wallet:
💎 Please enter your TON wallet address.
Send the address (UQ...)
en.no_card: You haven't created a card yet.
en.guide: 📚 How to Earn 1. Create card. 2. Set price. 3. Share link. 4. Earn 51% commission.
en.purchase_init: 💳 Purchase Product: {product} Price: {price} TON Send to: {wallet} Invoice ID (comment): {invoice_id}
en.help_text: ℹ️ Help 1. Create free card. 2. Share referral link. 3. Earn 51% commission. 4. Join weekly contest. Support: @osifungar
en.no_referrals: No referrals yet. Share your link!
en.ref_earned: 🎉 You earned {amount} TON from a referral!
